title: AstraZeneca Imfinzi Phase 3 Bladder Win
headline: AstraZeneca reports Phase 3 win for Imfinzi (durvalumab) in bladder cancer, challenging Merck's Keytruda.
key_facts: Phase 3 success in bladder cancer, Imfinzi vs Keytruda competition, Intensifying PD-1/PD-L1 rivalry, Imfinzi already approved in lung cancer

title: Regenxbio Duchenne Gene Therapy Approval
headline: Regenxbio to seek FDA approval for Duchenne muscular dystrophy gene therapy despite two serious adverse events.
key_facts: Gene therapy safety signals cloud approval odds, Two serious adverse events noted, CEO confidence on rare disease FDA flexibility, Post-Makary leadership changes anticipated

title: Biopharma Rallies Behind Pazdur for FDA
headline: Biopharma industry rallies behind FDA oncology chief Richard Pazdur to lead FDA following Makary's resignation.
key_facts: Pazdur as FDA commissioner candidate, Long-serving FDA oncology division head, Known for accelerated approvals, Leadership uncertainty post-Makary

title: Taiho Inqovi Label Expansion + FDA Drug Repurposing
headline: Taiho's Inqovi receives FDA label expansion; separately FDA floats new approach to repurpose older drugs.
key_facts: Inqovi (decitabine/cedazuridine) label expansion, Oral hypomethylating agent for MDS/CMML, FDA drug repurposing initiative, Lower dev costs for established molecules

title: Encoded Therapeutics Dravet Seizure Reduction
headline: Encoded Therapeutics reports its gene therapy reduced seizures in patients with Dravet syndrome.
key_facts: Gene therapy efficacy in severe pediatric Dravet epilepsy, Limited treatment options exist, Positive in vivo gene therapy momentum

title: Gene Therapy Sector Safety Concerns
headline: Boy developed brain tumor linked to gene therapy viral vector, raising fresh safety concerns for the field.
key_facts: Viral vector-linked cancer risk, Gene therapy safety overhang, Affects Regenxbio/Excision/Intellia programs, FDA approval risk-benefit calculus impact

title: Cabaletta CAR-T Results & Kyverna Approval
headline: Cabaletta Bio reports CAR-T results; Kyverna Therapeutics preparing first-of-its-kind autoimmune CAR-T approval application.
key_facts: CAR-T efficacy data, Autoimmune CAR-T indication breakthrough, First-of-its-kind approval pathway

title: BioAge Pivots from Obesity to Inflammation
headline: After axing its lead obesity asset, BioAge shifts focus to inflammation in pursuit of aging-related disease treatments.
key_facts: Obesity program axed, Inflammation/aging focus pivot, Smaller biotech exiting crowded GLP-1 space, Lilly/Novo dominance

title: BeOne Beqalzi FDA Approval
headline: BeOne's Beqalzi (BCL-2 inhibitor) receives FDA approval as Venclexta challenger.
key_facts: Beqalzi FDA approval, BCL-2 inhibitor mechanism, Competes with Venclexta (AbbVie/Roche)

title: Takeda Restructuring $1.26B Savings
headline: Takeda announces $1.26 billion savings target by 2028, including 4,500 job cuts in FY2026 and ~$633 million 2026 savings.
key_facts: $1.26 billion total savings target by 2028, ~$633 million in FY2026 savings, 4,500 job cuts in FY2026, Cost structure optimization

title: BMS-Hengrui Licensing Context
headline: Bristol Myers Squibb and Hengrui Pharma's $15.2B alliance continues China-to-West licensing wave.
key_facts: $15.2 billion deal value, 13 early-stage assets, Second-largest China-to-West since early 2025, BMS pipeline/patent cliff strategy
